title: vinca major subsp. difformis
intro: Vinca major subsp. difformis, also known as greater periwinkle, is a subspecies of flowering plant that is native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Vinca major subsp. difformis include its potential to treat conditions such as diabetes, high blood pressure, and certain types of cancer, due to its high content of alkaloids like vincristine and vinblastine. Vinca major subsp. difformis can be used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also used as a natural dye.
